description_long: This house is a modern, multi-unit residential structure featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The facade is dominated by large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The property includes multiple garages and driveways, with cars parked in front, and a spacious backyard enclosed by manicured hedges. The rear of the house opens onto private green spaces and wooden decks, some with covered patios and a hot tub. The exterior is primarily white with gray accents, and the landscaping is neatly organized with grass lawns and shrubbery. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban townhouse complex with shared and private outdoor areas.
description: A modern, multi-unit townhouse complex with flat roofs, large windows, garages, and private green yards enclosed by hedges. The design is minimalist and geometric, with white and gray exteriors and organized landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main units, large windows, two garages with cars, and a wide driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrances, and the depth of the property with visible backyard hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private green yards, wooden decks, a hot tub, and extensive hedge enclosures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the property, backyard hedges, and the rear entrances to the units.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are flush with the facade, featuring simple doors, no steps, and integrated garage entrances; minimal decorative elements.
